AM-cors-save-headers.name: AM-cors-save-headers
AM-cors-save-headers.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="AM-cors-save-headers">
    <DisplayName>AM-cors-save-headers</DisplayName>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>access_control_request_headers</Name>
        <Template>{substring(request.header.Access-Control-Request-Headers.values,1,-1)}</Template>
    </AssignVariable>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo type="request" transport="http" createNew="false"/>
</AssignMessage>

AM-cors-set-headers.name: AM-cors-set-headers
AM-cors-set-headers.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="AM-cors-set-headers">
    <DisplayName>AM-cors-set-headers</DisplayName>
    <Set>
        <Headers>
            <Header name="Access-Control-Allow-Origin">*</Header>
            <Header name="Access-Control-Allow-Headers">{access_control_request_headers}</Header>
            <!-- This is in seconds -->
            <Header name="Access-Control-Max-Age">60</Header>
            <Header name="Access-Control-Allow-Methods">GET, PUT, POST, DELETE</Header>
            <Header name="X-SF-CORS">true</Header>
        </Headers>
    </Set>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo type="response" transport="http" createNew="false"/>
</AssignMessage>

AM-debug.name: AM-debug
AM-debug.raw_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<AssignMessage async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" name="AM-debug">
    <DisplayName>AM-Debug</DisplayName>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>currentstep_flowstate</Name>
        <Value>NO_VALUE</Value>
        <Ref>currentstep.flowstate</Ref>
    </AssignVariable>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>is_error</Name>
        <Value>NO_VALUE</Value>
        <Ref>is.error</Ref>
    </AssignVariable>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>current_flow_name</Name>
        <Value>NO_VALUE</Value>
        <Ref>current.flow.name</Ref>
    </AssignVariable>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>parameter_current_flow_name</Name>
        <Value>NO_VALUE</Value>
        <Ref>parameter_current_flow_name</Ref>
    </AssignVariable>
    <AssignVariable>
        <Name>parameter_currentstep_flowstate</Name>
        <Value>NO_VALUE</Value>
        <Ref>parameter_currentstep_flowstate</Ref>
    </AssignVariable>
    <IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>true</IgnoreUnresolvedVariables>
    <AssignTo createNew="false" transport="http" type="request"/>
</AssignMessage>
